prompt: Generate the feature set names I need from this openapi.yaml.
model_raw:
<think>

</think>

```aro
(Create Todo: CreateTodo) {
    Extract the <todo> from the <request: body>.
    Store the <todo> into the <todo-repository>.
    Return the<OK: status> with the <todo>.
}

(List Todos: ListTodos) {
    Retrieve all <todos> from the <todo-repository>.
    Return the<OK: status> with the <todos>.
}

(Complete Todo: CompleteTodo) {
    Extract the <id> from the <request: pathParameters>.
    Retrieve the <todo> from the <todo-repository> where id =<id>.
    Return the<OK: status> with the <todo>.
}

(Delete Todo: DeleteTodo) {
    Extract the <id> from the <request: pathParameters>.
    Delete the <todo> from the <todo-repository> where id =<id>.
    Return the<OK: status> for the <result>.
}
```
